name: COMPLETE
description: The response fully and correctly answers the question.

name: INCOMPLETE
description: The response is cut off, truncated, or missing key parts of the answer.
follow_up_guidance: Ask the agent to provide the complete answer, pointing out what is missing or truncated.

name: CLARIFYING
description: Instead of answering, the response asks a clarifying question.
follow_up_guidance: Instruct the agent to not ask clarifying questions, make standard assumptions and state them explicitly, then provide a direct answer.
